description: Rename the field 'usrNm' in class com.example.User to 'username'.
Move class com.example.utils.DateHelper to package com.example.common.
Create a new interface PaymentGateway in package com.example.payments with a method 'boolean charge(double amount)'.
Add a method 'String getDisplayName()' to class com.example.User that returns firstName + " " + lastName.

params.methodText: public String getDisplayName() { return firstName + " " + lastName; }

description: Rename the method 'parseNewFormat' in class com.example.LegacyHelper to 'parseInput'. Update all call sites.

validation.note: ServiceLayer.java calls parseNewFormat — structured rename updates both files; text-edit typically misses the cross-file call site.

description: Inline the method com.example.LegacyHelper#normalize everywhere and delete the original. Call sites are in ServiceLayer (param 'raw'), SearchService (param 'query'), ReportGenerator (params 'fieldValue' and 'title'), and DataImporter (param 'entry' in a loop). Each call site uses a different parameter name — InlineMethodProcessor substitutes correctly by construction.

validation.note: 4 files call normalize with different param names. InlineMethodProcessor handles all by construction. A text-edit agent must enumerate all 4 files, then substitute the correct local parameter name at each call site — missing one causes compile failure; using the wrong name produces silent incorrectness.

description: Change the signature of com.example.Notifier#send to add a second parameter 'int priority' with default value 0.
